arts.ttl: Barcelona-Inter Milan Preview: What to expect from the Nerazzurri from the experts
arts.sum: Barcelona and Inter will meet again for the first time at the semi-final stage in 15 years in the Champions League, with both sides desperate to return to the final. In Inter’s case, a longing that comes from coming so close three years ago against Manchester City, and from a Barcelona perspective, they are looking […] The post Barcelona-Inter Milan Preview: What to expect from the Nerazzurri from the experts appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Chain-smoking in the changing rooms, married to a Ukrainian pop star and answering Barcelona's plea on the golf course - how unlikely hero Wojciech Szczesny is inspiring a quadruple tilt ahead of Inter Milan showdown
arts.sum: Szczesny is doing all this on his own terms - he still chain-smokes in the changing rooms, despite that getting him in trouble with Arsene Wenger at Arsenal, and helps write lyrics for his wife.
